Introducing a captivating butterfly sculpture with a modern twist: a stunning fusion of stained glass aesthetics and polygonal design. This exquisite artwork comes in two sizes, allowing you to choose the perfect fit for your space. The large size measures 25 centimeters in width, 20 centimeters in height, and features a sleek 2-millimeter depth. For a more delicate touch, the smaller size is 25% smaller, offering a graceful presence that measures 18.75 centimeters in width, 15 centimeters in height, and maintains the same elegant 2-millimeter depth.What makes this piece truly exceptional is the ability to personalize it to your taste. You have the freedom to select your own base and top colors, infusing the sculpture with your unique vision. Let your imagination soar as you create a truly bespoke masterpiece that reflects your style and aesthetic. Immerse yourself in the contemporary allure of this exceptional creation, available in two enchanting sizes and customizable colors.

This exquisite artwork comes in two sizes, allowing you to choose the perfect fit for your space. The large size measures 25 centimeters in width, 20 centimeters in height, and features a sleek 2-millimeter depth. For a more delicate touch, the smaller size is 25% smaller, offering a graceful presence that measures 18.75 centimeters in width, 15 centimeters in height, and maintains the same elegant 2-millimeter depth.What makes this piece truly exceptional is the ability to personalize it to your taste. You have the freedom to select your own base and top colors, infusing the sculpture with your unique vision. Let your imagination soar as you create a truly bespoke masterpiece that reflects your style and aesthetic. Immerse yourself in the contemporary allure of this exceptional creation, available in two enchanting sizes and customizable colors.
